induction_input: the dog the man the woman the child bit kicked chased barked.

induced_prompt_raw:
Generate a sentence following the pattern: "the [noun1] the [noun2] ... the [nounk] [verb1] [verb2] ... [verbk]" where:  
- The rightmost noun (nounk) acts as the subject of verb1, with the noun to its left (nounk-1) as the object.  
- Then nounk-1 acts as the subject of verb2, with the next left noun (nounk-2) as the object, and so on.  
- The leftmost noun (noun1) acts as the subject of the final verb (verbk), which must be intransitive.  
Ensure all actions are plausible and semantically coherent.
